case_title: LEVINE, MATTHEW vs. BRADSHAW, CHARLES et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVINE, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT BRADSHAW, CHARLES DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-04-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-01-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-15-1993
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-04-1994, CONTINUED TO FEB-18-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-18-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-18-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVINE, MATTHEW SERVED DEC-10-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRADSHAW, CHARLES
OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-21-1994, CONTINUED TO MAY-20-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 5/20/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-20-1994, CONTINUED TO JUL-19-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 7/19/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-19-1994, CONTINUED TO SEP-20-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 9/13/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-20-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-20-1994, TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR OCT-20-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-20-1994, OFF CALENDAR
